key.name: gaps-enabled
key.description: Add gaps around maximized and tiled windows.

key.name: gap-size
key.description: The size of gaps around tiled and maximized windows.

key.name: animation-delay
key.description: Time to wait for GNOME's tiling animation before applying gaps.

key.name: topbar-enabled
key.description: Make the top bar transparent with pill-shaped indicators. Customize via stylesheet.css.

key.name: tile-left
key.description: Tile the focused window to the left half of the screen with gaps.

key.name: tile-right
key.description: Tile the focused window to the right half of the screen with gaps.

key.name: tile-maximize
key.description: Maximize the focused window with gaps on all sides.

key.name: tile-restore
key.description: Restore a tiled window to its original size, or minimize if already restored.
